ddls:
CREATE TABLE "operations" (
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operation */,
  "num1" INTEGER /* First operand in the operation */,
  "num2" INTEGER /* Second operand in the operation */,
  "operator" TEXT /* Mathematical operator used (e.g., +, -, *, /) */,
  "result" INTEGER /* Result of the operation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the operation */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the operation was performed */,
  "operation_type" INTEGER /* Type of operation (e.g., addition, subtraction, multiplication, division) */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the operation result */,
  "is_valid" INTEGER /* Flag to mark if the operation result is valid or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operations_operation_type FOREIGN KEY ("operation_type") REFERENCES operation_types ("operation_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for user authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., standard, auditor, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login time */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to mark if the user account is active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Longer description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operation_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operation being logged */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the operation */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Detailed message describing the operation */,
  "log_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the log entry was created */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Log level (e.g., info, warning, error) */,
  "log_category" TEXT /* Log category (e.g., operation, system, error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operation_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_operation_logs_operation_id FOREIGN KEY ("operation_id") REFERENCES operations ("operation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operation_types" (
  "operation_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operation type */,
  "operation_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the operation type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the operation type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operation_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_trail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail entry */,
  "operation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operation being audited */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the operation */,
  "audit_message" TEXT /* Detailed message describing the operation */,
  "audit_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the audit trail entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_trail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_operation_id FOREIGN KEY ("operation_id") REFERENCES operations ("operation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
